items.title: Revamped Wisdom Deploy Wizard UI for a Sleek Experience in Frontend Web ✨
items.summary: This update introduces a complete redesign of the Wisdom deploy wizard, enhancing its visual appeal with a polished card-based layout. Key features include a centered header, step-card blocks for subscription plans and instance specs, and a user-friendly post-payment redirect hint. The changes improve user experience while maintaining existing functionality.

items.title: Centralized Tool Schema Management in Platform Service 🚀
items.summary: This update reverts the previous change that stripped top-level combinators from tool schemas specific to Claude models. The central OpenAI worker now handles this normalization for all providers, enhancing consistency and reducing redundancy in the codebase. The revert ensures that non-BYOK paths remain fully covered while acknowledging the rare case of BYOK usage for Claude models.

items.title: Arabic UI Localization Enhancements in Nexior 🎉
items.summary: This update localizes 380 Arabic UI messages across 14 namespaces, replacing outdated English and Chinese placeholders. It introduces an opt-in translator repair mode for existing placeholders and strengthens the i18n CI to reject non-compliant messages. Additionally, validation processes for interpolation variables and HTML-like tags have been implemented to ensure quality.

items.title: Exciting New Connectors: Ghost, Habr, and Pinterest Added in Backend 🚀
items.summary: This update introduces new connectors for Ghost, Habr, and Pinterest, enhancing our integration capabilities. The Ghost connector allows users to connect their self-hosted sites using the Admin API, while Pinterest's OAuth connector is now available, albeit hidden until further review. Habr continues to utilize a lightweight cookie method, ensuring existing connections remain valid without migration.

items.title: Streamlined Habr Cookie Client Integration in Skills 🚀
items.summary: This update replaces the heavier Habr BrowserDevice workflow with a lightweight Cookie-authenticated Skill, enhancing performance and security. Key improvements include strict Cookie-domain filtering, CSRF handling, and robust post-publish verification. The integration has been validated against Habr's production environment, ensuring reliability and efficiency.

items.title: Fix default TTS format to mp3 for seamless requests in Platform Service 🎶
items.summary: This update resolves an issue where Fish TTS requests without a specified format were returning HTTP 400 errors. By defaulting the body format to 'mp3', the system now ensures that these requests succeed, improving user experience. Additionally, tests have been added to verify the new behavior and prevent future regressions.

items.title: Official v2 Payment Payloads Implementation in X402 Client 🚀
items.summary: This update introduces the official v2 `PaymentPayload`, aligning with the accepted requirements. It includes support for canonical Base, SKALE, and Solana CAIP-2 networks, and implements payment retries via `PAYMENT-SIGNATURE`. Additionally, it maintains compatibility with legacy amount handling while enhancing the overall payment structure.

items.title: Exciting New Playable Finished Films in Nexior 🎬
items.summary: This update introduces visible 'Finished film' badges and separate Play/Copy actions on Poivelle discovery cards. Users can now enjoy real finished films in a full-control player, complete with features like seek, volume, and fullscreen options. Additionally, a new narrative-film category has been added, enhancing the overall user experience.

items.title: New Films Added to Discovery API in Platform Service 🎬
items.summary: This update introduces three verified Poivelle finished films to the discovery API: PulseCam TVC, 《醒来之前》, and Northstar: Origin. Key enhancements include typed HTTPS-only video URLs, a narrative category, and explicit copyable semantics, ensuring a structured approach to film access and playback. The changes enhance user experience while maintaining strict compliance with media rights and access protocols.

items.title: Enhance Pinterest Integration in Platform Service 🚀
items.summary: This update maps the Pinterest OAuth provider to the `$PINTEREST_TOKEN` environment variable, enhancing the Pinterest Skill functionality. It includes the addition of tests for the provider environment variable resolver and ensures that no secret values are exposed in the source code. The changes are validated with passing tests and linting checks.

items.title: Exciting New Skills for Habr, Ghost, and Pinterest in Skills 🚀
items.summary: This update introduces three new skills: a Habr local-browser skill for managing articles, a Ghost Admin API skill with enhanced security features, and a Pinterest API v5 skill for creating and reading Pins. Each skill requires explicit user confirmation for actions, ensuring a secure and controlled experience. The changes enhance the platform's capabilities and provide users with more tools for content management.

items.title: Revamp Feishu Connector Icon for Clarity in Backend 🎨
items.summary: This update replaces the broken Feishu connector icon and publisher logo with verified official assets from Feishu's homepage. The new URLs ensure that the images are accessible and correctly displayed, enhancing the user experience. All references to the old icon have been removed, confirming a clean integration.

items.title: Strengthen Suno Rollout Resilience in Platform Service 🚀
items.summary: This update enhances the Suno rollout by fixing DNS lookup issues and improving error handling for async credit-exhaustion failures in MountSea. Key changes include better reporting of provider-owned fields during validation failures and improved diagnostics for callback errors. The overall worker behavior is now more robust, ensuring safer automatic rollouts.

items.title: Enhance tool schema handling for Claude & Gemini in Platform Service 🚀
items.summary: This update dissolves top-level combinators for function tools in response to strict upstream requirements from Claude and Gemini, which previously resulted in errors. The changes ensure that non-BYOK clients, including Nexior, receive the same protection against invalid schemas. Comprehensive tests confirm that parameters are preserved and return successful responses across both platforms.

items.title: Say Goodbye to Claude Fable 5 in Nexior 🚀
items.summary: This update removes Claude Fable 5 from the Studio Claude model picker and the global chat model registry. All related locale keys and model-name union members have been eliminated, ensuring a cleaner user experience. The backend remains unaffected, maintaining stability across billing, OpenAPI, and other services.

items.title: Streamline Wisdom Deploy Wizard to One Screen in Frontend Web 🚀
items.summary: The Wisdom deploy wizard has been refactored from a four-step process into a single-screen layout, enhancing user experience. Key changes include the integration of subscription plan details and instance specifications on one screen, while maintaining existing deployment logic. Internationalization support has been added for all 12 locales, ensuring a consistent experience across languages.

items.title: Fix tool-schema arrays for Gemini compatibility in Platform Service 🚀
items.summary: This update addresses the issue where Gemini models return HTTP 400 errors due to missing 'items' in array nodes of function-tool JSON Schemas. The worker now injects a permissive 'items: {}' when absent, ensuring compatibility with Gemini while maintaining functionality for other models. Verification through unit tests and live E2E tests confirms that the changes resolve the issue effectively.

items.title: Refactor Deployment Components for Better Modularity in Frontend Web 🚀
items.summary: This update extracts the appliance-only BillingBar and McpChannel components from Manage.vue, enhancing modularity and maintainability. The new components are now self-contained, allowing for cleaner code in the management page while preserving existing functionality. Key computed properties and methods have been appropriately adjusted to ensure no behavioral regressions occur.

items.title: Enhance Facebook Connector for Studio Chat in Backend 🚀
items.summary: This update completes the Facebook BYOC connector, enabling it to function within studio chat. Key changes include the addition of required skills for automatic installation and an optional page_id credential field for better integration. These improvements ensure that connected Facebook accounts can now effectively interact with the system, enhancing user experience.

items.title: New Facebook Page Publishing Skill Added in Skills 🚀
items.summary: We've introduced a new BYOC connector skill that allows users to publish text, link, and photo posts to their Facebook Page via the Graph API. This skill also enables reading recent posts from the Page, enhancing the functionality of our existing Facebook connector. With this update, users can now effectively manage their Facebook Page content directly from our platform.

items.title: Eliminate Empty Space Above Veo Config Tabs in Nexior 🎉
items.summary: This update resolves the issue of excessive whitespace above the Veo config tabs by aligning the ActionSelector with the shared 48px scenario-tabs pattern. The tab height has been adjusted from 64px to 48px, eliminating the dead space and ensuring proper alignment with the field labels below. All relevant tests have been updated and passed successfully.

items.title: Enhance Seedance Mini's First-Frame Functionality in Platform Service 🚀
items.summary: This update ensures that Seedance 2.0 Mini operates strictly in first-frame-only mode by removing the unsupported `reference_image` payload and its associated Graph edges. The changes maintain the integrity of the identity through the selected refined first-frame Artifact while keeping Seedance Fast transitions unchanged. Validation tests confirm that all narrative blueprints function correctly without regressions.

items.title: Exciting New Discovery Features in Platform Service 🚀
items.summary: This update introduces an authenticated Poivelle discovery feed featuring nine official works and community workflows. Users can now create complete projects with a single click, ensuring community listings are tenant/site scoped while maintaining creator privacy. The changes enhance project creation and discovery processes, making it easier for users to access and utilize various templates.

items.title: Updated V8.1 MCP Guidance for Clarity in M C Ps 🚀
items.summary: This update sets the default MCP version to V8.1 and corrects prompt guidance, clarifying that V8.1 does not support Quality or Turbo modes. It also separates the rules for V8.0 Alpha from V8.1, removes outdated examples, and ensures the documentation reflects the current capabilities accurately. Comprehensive tests confirm the changes are clean and functional.

items.title: Exciting New Midjourney CLI Package Added in Clis 🚀
items.summary: We've introduced the `midjourney/` package to the CLI, implementing all 8 API endpoints for seamless interaction with Midjourney. Key commands include `imagine`, `edits`, `videos`, and more, allowing users to generate and manipulate images and videos effortlessly. This addition enhances the functionality of the AceDataCloud CLI, making it a powerful tool for creative projects.

items.title: Strengthen Production Cutover Process in x402 🚀
items.summary: This update enhances the production cutover process by ensuring only expired legacy authorizations are drained during preflight. Key changes include hardening the preflight pod's security settings and using the configured canonical Base network. Additionally, new tests have been added to validate these improvements, ensuring a smoother transition to the official v2 settings.

items.title: Align Upload Actions for Better Layout in Nexior 🎨
items.summary: This update enhances the layout of scenario upload actions by pinning them to the right while keeping labels and help icons on the left. Additionally, it restores spacing in the ConfigPanel and adjusts Pika previews to maintain their lifecycle. The changes improve user experience and maintain consistency across components.

items.title: Streamline Voice Model Creation by Defaulting to Private in Nexior 🎤
items.summary: This update removes the visibility picker from the Fish voice-clone creation panel, simplifying the user interface. Voice models will now always be created as private by default, enhancing user privacy. The payload still sends visibility as 'private', ensuring consistency across the application.

items.title: Revamp Creator Experience with Prompt-First Home in Nexior 🎬
items.summary: This update introduces a new prompt-first creator home for the `/poivelle` route, enhancing user engagement by showcasing real works and providing one-click project copying. Key features include a searchable feed of projects, improved error handling, and support for 17 locales. The professional Studio workspace remains accessible, ensuring a seamless transition for users.

items.title: Enhance Currency Price Display in Frontend Web 🚀
items.summary: This update improves the display of currency prices for base packages by reusing the existing `basePackage` prop. Users can now see currency prices before selecting a package, while maintaining the current pricing and discount behavior for selected packages. The changes ensure a seamless user experience without introducing new pricing contracts or frontend logic.

items.title: Enhance V8.1 Capabilities in Nexior 🚀
items.summary: This update enforces new capabilities for Midjourney V8.1, including hiding unsupported Quality controls and normalizing selections. Turbo mode is now restricted for image generation while preserving it for video. Comprehensive tests have been conducted to ensure functionality and stability.

items.title: Enhance Midjourney V8.1 Control Handling in Platform Service 🚀
items.summary: This update improves the handling of unsupported Midjourney V8.1 controls by rejecting invalid Quality and Turbo parameters. It ensures that hold mode does not inject unsupported flags and preserves the behavior of V8.0 Alpha Quality. Comprehensive tests have been added to validate these changes and maintain system integrity.

items.title: Enhance V8.1 Billing Capabilities in Backend 🚀
items.summary: This update refines the billing structure for V8.1 by replacing the previous premium rules with two official resolution tiers: SD at 0.216 Credits and HD at 0.351 Credits. It also eliminates unnecessary surcharges and clarifies that V8.1 supports Fast and Relax modes only, while documenting these changes in the API and relevant documentation. Comprehensive validation has confirmed the accuracy of these updates.

items.title: Normalize Claude Tool Schemas for Better Compatibility in Platform Service 🚀
items.summary: This update prevents Claude chat requests from forwarding unsupported top-level schema combinators, ensuring compatibility with the Claude proxy. The changes preserve nested schema constraints while leaving non-Claude model requests unaffected. Validation tests confirm that the modifications enhance functionality without introducing errors.

items.title: Enhance Pending Task Metadata Display in Nexior 🚀
items.summary: This update introduces the display of Nano Banana task metadata, including model, resolution, aspect ratio, action, and task ID, while the generation is still pending. Existing success and failure rendering is preserved once a response is received, and regression coverage has been added for the pre-response state. Comprehensive validation has confirmed the functionality across various task previews.

items.title: Launch Feishu Store App Connector in Backend 🚀
items.summary: This update introduces the Feishu Store App OAuth connector to the Studio connector catalog, enhancing integration capabilities. Key changes include the injection of Feishu credentials into AuthBackend and the implementation of a connection refresh CronJob. The integration ensures that invalid refresh tokens are rejected, maintaining secure access to Feishu's APIs.

items.title: Enhance Voice Model Controls Visibility in Nexior 🎨
items.summary: This update improves the visibility and train-mode controls in the Fish voice-clone create panel by removing the 'small' size attribute from the radio groups. As a result, these controls now match the default size of surrounding elements, enhancing consistency and usability. The change involves a minor template adjustment with no impact on functionality.

items.title: Enhance Subscription Flow in Frontend Web 🚀
items.summary: This update integrates the prepaid subscription gate into the Wisdom deploy funnel, enhancing the user experience by ensuring only subscribed users can deploy appliances. Key changes include modifications to the Wisdom and Buy components for better handling of subscription checks and redirect logic, as well as improvements in internationalization support. The validation process confirms that all changes are clean and functional.

items.title: Enforce Active Subscription for Wisdom Deployments in Backend 🚀
items.summary: This update introduces a requirement for an active subscription to deploy Wisdom appliances, closing the last billing bypass. Non-superuser deployments of `k8s_appliance` will now return a 402 error if the subscription is expired or missing, while other deployment types remain unaffected. This change ensures that all new deployments are gated appropriately, enhancing billing integrity.

items.title: Upgrade Django to 5.2.16 in x402 🚀
items.summary: This update bumps Django from version 3.2.25 to 5.2.16, enhancing security and performance. Key fixes include addressing multiple CVEs and ensuring better response handling. The changes in the poetry.lock and pyproject.toml files reflect the updated dependencies.

items.title: Revamped Browser Device Bridge Architecture in Index 🚀
items.summary: This update consolidates the previous conflicting Browser Device Bridge proposals into a single, actionable architecture driven by cloud aichat2 for real Chrome execution. Key changes include the introduction of a unified extension model, clear responsibilities for various components, and a focus on security and reliability without backward compatibility. The implementation plan outlines a structured rollout with detailed testing and validation processes.

items.title: Enhance Credential Limits Enforcement in Gateway 🚀
items.summary: This update implements stricter enforcement of credential request limits within the billing path of the Gateway. It ensures that requests are rejected if the combined used amount and estimated cost exceed the defined limit, preventing overspending. Additionally, it introduces new utility functions to handle credential limit checks and maintains existing behaviors for free requests.

items.title: Streamline and Modernize Facilitator in x402 🚀
items.summary: This update removes obsolete scaffolding and consolidates builds into a single non-root Dockerfile. Key changes include the removal of outdated manifests and settings, alongside a modernization of the deployment workflow to align with current Docker actions. All tests passed successfully, ensuring stability and performance improvements.

items.title: Standardized Poivelle Billing Implementation in Platform Service 🚀
items.summary: This update aligns the Poivelle provider's billing process with the standard architecture used across AceDataCloud services. Key changes include the removal of outdated endpoints and the introduction of a new credential system for external runs, enhancing security and efficiency. The deployment has been validated with all tests passing, ensuring a smooth transition.

items.title: Enhance Poivelle Billing Credentials in Nexior 🚀
items.summary: This update aligns Poivelle with Nexior's standard billing practices by implementing a temporary credential system for external provider closures. Key changes include the creation of a 24-hour credential that adheres to existing cost rules and usage recording, ensuring a seamless integration with public APIs. The update also improves error handling and credential management, enhancing overall system reliability.

items.title: Enhance Wisdom Channel Replies with Polling Fallback in Coding Bridge 🚀
items.summary: This update introduces a polling fallback for Wisdom channel replies, ensuring that WeChat messages can be answered even when WebSocket connections are active. Key improvements include deduplication of messages, stable conversation IDs, and enhanced pagination handling. The changes have been verified with comprehensive tests and live checks, ensuring robust functionality.

items.title: Enhance Billing Integration and Refactor Manage Page in Index 🚀
items.summary: This update introduces a new design document for integrating billing into the deployment funnel, addressing key issues where billing was only accessible through the renewal path. The refactor of the Manage page aims to streamline components and improve user experience by separating appliance-specific logic. Additionally, the configuration wizard has been simplified to enhance usability.

items.title: Enhance Production Workflows in Nexior 🚀
items.summary: This update transforms Poivelle's backend controls into user-friendly production workflows, allowing users to review project costs, inspect run details, and compare Takes. Key features include video clip reordering, forensic failure diagnostics, and support for multiple locales. The changes improve usability and maintain existing API functionality, ensuring a seamless transition for users.

items.title: Enhance Media Quality Gates for Production in Platform Service 🎥
items.summary: This update implements stringent quality gates for media compositions in production, ensuring that only artifacts meeting specific criteria are committed. Key changes include the enforcement of frame count and FPS verification, as well as the introduction of automatic quality evidence in the production review workflow. These enhancements aim to mitigate risks associated with media quality and improve overall reliability.

items.title: Enhance Documentation and Production Deployment in x402 🚀
items.summary: This update introduces comprehensive documentation for the v2 migration, detailing architecture changes, client-visible updates, and rollback procedures. Key enhancements include aligning production deployments with validated candidates, implementing health probes, and deploying a reconciliation CronJob for improved stability. The changes ensure a smoother transition and robust validation processes for the x402 system.

items.title: Enhance Subscription Management UI for Wisdom Appliance in Frontend Web 🚀
items.summary: This update introduces a new UI for users to buy or renew subscriptions for the Wisdom appliance, enhancing the billing experience. Key features include a dedicated billing bar in the management view, which displays subscription status and a countdown to expiry, as well as improved internationalization support across multiple languages. The changes ensure a seamless user experience while maintaining existing functionality.

items.title: Revamp of Facilitator with Official x402 v2 in x402 🚀
items.summary: This update replaces the legacy facilitator with the official x402 version 2.16.0, enhancing support for multiple production rails including Base and Solana. Key improvements include PostgreSQL persistence, two-replica signer locking, and a new deployment at https://facilitator2.acedata.cloud. The cleanup also removes 16 outdated files, streamlining the codebase significantly.

items.title: Implement prepaid-period expiry for Wisdom appliances in Backend 🚀
items.summary: This update introduces a new hourly CronJob that enforces the prepaid-subscription lifecycle for Wisdom appliances. Key changes include the addition of a management command to handle deployment expirations and a structured logging system for billing events. The implementation ensures that resources are reclaimed only after a grace period, enhancing user experience and resource management.

items.title: Launch Prepaid Packages for Wisdom Appliance in Backend 🚀
items.summary: This update introduces three prepaid subscription packages for the Wisdom digital-human appliance, enabling purchase options for both the `wechat-bot` and `wisdom` deployment services. The packages include a 3-day, 7-day, and 30-day option, allowing users to prepay and extend their service duration. This change resolves the previous issue of the appliance being un-buyable due to the absence of available packages.

items.title: Introducing Prepaid Billing for Wisdom Appliance in Index 🚀
items.summary: This update adds a new design document for the Wisdom appliance billing model, featuring a prepaid period subscription. Key changes include a structured expiry process and the introduction of three period packages for users. The documentation also outlines the expected margins and resource management strategies to ensure profitability.

items.title: Enhance Forensic Validation Contracts in Platform Service 🚀
items.summary: This update introduces new forensic validation contracts, including versioned reference frames and QC result contracts. Key features include deterministic timeline validation, immutable project-scoped records, and new APIs for forensic report management. These enhancements aim to improve the reliability of video segment validation and ensure explicit error handling.

items.title: Enhance Poivelle Documentation with Forensics Reference in Index 📚
items.summary: This update adds the Reference Forensics & Delivery Proof contract to the Poivelle RFC, establishing hard-gate requirements for frame-exact failures. Key documentation improvements include detailed privacy, rights, and consent guidelines, along with an updated plans index that clarifies the schema's capabilities. The changes aim to enhance clarity and compliance for future implementations.

items.title: Update Vue to Latest Version in Frontend Web 🚀
items.summary: This update bumps Vue from version 3.5.38 to 3.5.40, incorporating several bug fixes and improvements. Key changes include enhancements in compiler-core, hydration, and runtime-core, which aim to improve performance and stability. The update ensures that the application benefits from the latest features and fixes provided by the Vue team.

items.title: Strengthen WeChat OAuth Callback Handling in Frontend Web 🚀
items.summary: This update introduces a canonical WeChat OAuth contract, ensuring fixed redirect URIs and single string inputs for redirect and state parameters. It enhances security by rejecting duplicate arrays and removing sensitive logs. The changes aim to prevent prior query contamination and streamline the OAuth flow for both desktop and mobile users.

items.title: Update Suno Pricing to 0.77 Credits in Backend 🎶
items.summary: This update raises the pricing for Suno music generation actions from 0.55 to 0.77 Credits. The changes ensure that the runtime API billing and service-page display pricing remain aligned. Additionally, focused regression tests have been added for the adjusted actions while maintaining checks for unchanged actions.

items.title: Introducing CNBlogs Publishing Skill in Skills 🚀
items.summary: This update adds a new CNBlogs publishing skill, featuring a CLI and agent that adheres to the official CNBlogs API. Key functionalities include token verification, post management (create, update, delete), and draft handling, ensuring a streamlined user experience. Comprehensive tests validate the implementation, enhancing reliability and performance.

items.title: Introducing CNBlogs PAT Publishing Connector in Backend 🚀
items.summary: This update adds a new CNBlogs publishing connector that allows users to connect using a personal access token securely. The connector features an official CNBlogs icon and integrates with the existing skill set for enhanced publishing suggestions. Comprehensive testing has been conducted to ensure functionality and reliability.

items.title: Enhance LLM Stream Reliability in Platform Service 🚀
items.summary: This update improves the reliability of LLM stream handling by implementing retries for stalled first-token streams, allowing up to three attempts if no meaningful SSE event is received within 60 seconds. Additionally, the timeout for post-first-event streams has been extended to 600 seconds, and measures have been taken to prevent orphaned requests when clients disconnect. The changes have been validated with comprehensive tests, ensuring robust performance.

items.title: Remove Incorrect `type` Field from Cursor MCP Config in Backend 🚀
items.summary: This update eliminates the fabricated `type` field from the Cursor MCP configuration template, aligning it with official documentation. The change ensures that the configuration is accurate and prevents confusion for users copying the template. This fix is part of a preventive measure before the MCP variants are verified and made live.

items.title: Revamped Earning Documentation in Backend 🚀
items.summary: This update overhauls the earning documentation, removing references to Nexior deployment and replacing them with a no-code Studio white-label setup. A total of 30 document files were modified or added, featuring real screenshots and examples to enhance clarity and accuracy. Key improvements include updated marketing content and connector visuals, ensuring a more user-friendly experience.

items.title: Fix Skill Install Command to Use Release Tags in Backend 🚀
items.summary: This update resolves an issue where the Skill install command was incorrectly using a SHA, which led to silent failures. The command now correctly pins to a published Skills release tag, ensuring that the correct version is installed. All relevant services have been updated and validated, resulting in successful tests and a clean implementation.

items.title: Update markdown-it-anchor to 9.2.1 in Frontend Web 🚀
items.summary: This update bumps the markdown-it-anchor dependency from version 9.2.0 to 9.2.1. The new version preserves the level of inline tokens in header links, enhancing the functionality of the markdown parser. This change is expected to improve the overall rendering of markdown content in the application.
